baseline.note: no legacy ledger — accounting started clean; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence

reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only — they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades — never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.

down_bias_gate.note: restrict-only: harvest DOWN/TV asymmetry by blocking proven-losing UP stacks

mtf_gate.note: observe-only conflict veto: blocks 4m/5m fast-pair conflict only (loop arch default). require_confirm/side_align are opt-in restrict-only layers, not trade authority.

confidence_tier.note: At 15m TTC sweet spot, TV MTF regime adjusts min_edge/max_price only. TV trade gates remain off per operator lock.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade — learning can never bypass them.

last_note.summary: Only 4 settled signal trades exist (all DOWN_STRONG, n<8), producing 25% win-rate and negative realized PnL despite mildly positive avg_ev_after_cost; no bucket meets the n>=8 threshold for confirmation. RSI-trend state learning has larger history but remains purely diagnostic and shows near-random accuracy (~0.48). Everything else is noise or insufficient evidence.
failing: DOWN_STRONG / 0.5-0.8 strength signals (n=4, 0.25 WR, negative PnL)
warnings: total settled_with_signal=4 <<8 so all win-rate/EV claims unreliable
observe-only mode with 14k+ rejections means no real selectivity tested
focus_next: accumulate >=8-30 settled trades per bucket before any pattern evaluation
monitor whether positive avg_ev_after_cost persists with larger n

history.summary: Signal evidence remains too thin (n=4 settled trades, all DOWN_STRONG) to confirm any profitable pattern; win rate 0.25 and negative realized PnL but positive avg EV after cost are both unreliable. RSI-trend states have larger samples yet show near-random accuracy (0.4775) with no bucket meeting the n>=8 + confident >breakeven threshold. Everything else is noise or insufficient data.
changes_since_last: first analysis; no prior results to compare

history.summary: Only 4 settled trades exist (all DOWN_STRONG, n<8), producing 0.25 win-rate and negative realized PnL despite mildly positive avg EV after cost; every bucket is below the reliability threshold and shows no confirmed edge. RSI-trend component has larger history but remains decoupled from execution. No patterns qualify as confirmed profitable versus noise.
changes_since_last: no prior analysis supplied; first observation shows exclusively insufficient evidence

history.summary: Only 4 settled signal trades exist (all DOWN_STRONG, n<8), producing 25% win rate and negative realized PnL but slightly positive avg EV after cost; all other signal buckets are ignored per threshold. RSI-trend states contain usable sample sizes yet show near-random hit rates (~0.48) with no profitable edge confirmed. No patterns reach confirmed profitable status.
changes_since_last: no prior analysis supplied; first observation

history.summary: Only 4 settled signal trades exist (all DOWN_STRONG, n<8), producing negative realized PnL but slightly positive avg EV after cost; every bucket and the edge_vs_5min comparison remain below the minimum evidence threshold so nothing is statistically distinguishable from noise.

High rejection count (14k+) and observe-only mode continue with no promotion eligibility. RSI trend states show larger samples but remain disconnected from PnL outcomes.

RSI-trend state learning has larger history but remains disconnected from actual bot entries. No material change detectable from prior (first analysis).

history.summary: Only 4 settled signal trades exist (all DOWN_STRONG, n<8), producing 25% win-rate and negative realized PnL despite mildly positive avg_ev_after_cost; no bucket meets the n>=8 threshold for confirmation. RSI-trend state learning has larger history but remains purely diagnostic and shows near-random accuracy (~0.48). Everything else is noise or insufficient evidence.

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only — never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only — never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decides; bot executes (paper). shadow=decide+grade only (no trade), follow=engine follows direction/size subject to the deterministic floor (execution realism, risk caps, freshness). Fail-closed -> no_trade.

headlines: Bitcoin falls below $58,000 amid accelerated leveraged liquidations
BTC closes worst month since June 2022 with ongoing weakness
Spot ETF outflows continue as key demand source weakens

verifier.note: independent Claude maker-checker; can only veto/shrink a Grok-proposed paper trade, never force one; fail-open; PAPER ONLY.

last_note.summary: Dep-arb realized -$407 on 127 settled trades with -18% capture ratio vs +$2226 theoretical hold-to-resolution. Nested execute blocked 438 trades, clock_skew rejected 764, and bucket_bleeding rejected 431 total. No verifier-approved trades exist (n=0); verifier veto had insufficient evidence (n=7) but would have saved -$350. Mid-exit at 60s shows 83% convergence but did not prevent massive bleed.

knob_recommendations.reason: nested_execute blocked 438 trades but dep-arb still lost -$407 on 127 settled; conjunction-only may reduce over-filtering without harming edge
clock_skew rejected 764 stale parent books; enabling may prevent entry on phantom convergence and reduce bucket_bleeding rejections
649 rejected for entry_vwap_above_cap at 0.52; tightening to 0.48 filters marginal entries contributing to -18% capture ratio
0 verifier-approved settled trades exist; requiring verdict gates all dep-arb until Claude maker-checker validates edge at settle (n>=10)

last_note.dep_arb_next_experiment: Disable nested_execute, enable clock_skew, lower max_entry_vwap to 0.48, and require verifier verdict to gate all dep-arb until n>=10 vetoes validate Claude maker-checker edge at settle.

new_lessons.rule: bucket_bleeding rejected 431 trades across all bands; dep-arb entries bleeding >10% at book time predict poor hold-to-resolution capture
mid_exit at 60s with 83% convergence did not prevent -18% capture ratio; bleed occurs before mid-convergence or mid-exit fails to capture theoretical edge
verifier_veto n=7 < 10 min; insufficient evidence to assess Claude maker-checker quality; must accumulate vetoes until ready_for_gate=true before enabling VERIFIER_REQUIRE
nested_execute blocked 438 trades but dep-arb still lost -$407; no evidence nested logic improves capture ratio vs conjunction-only execute

research_loop.note: strategy-layer research meta-loop: independent model proposes exploit/avoid contexts + bounded knob nudges + lessons. Observe-only unless auto_apply (whitelisted+bounded). PAPER ONLY.

loops.note: formalized sub-loops (data/signal/verify/execute/risk/research/news/lessons); each has a trigger + skill + verifier + verifiable stop + a liveness watchdog (last_beat_age_s/stalled). PAPER ONLY.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

last_violations.description: 15m up-mid below nested 5m up-mid: P(up_15m) cannot be < P(up_5m) for overlapping window

mid_convergence.note: Mid-gap mean-reversion experiment: converged=True when gap at horizon is <50% of gap at violation snap. Does not trade.

dependency_arbitrage.note: LCMM nested-window scanner + optional paper execution on validated violations; outcome-settled P&L + optional Kelly + experiment gates.

arb_graph.note: Graph is rebuilt each tick from open windows; Grok edges are never tradable alone.

dep_arb_intel.headline: Grok proposals: in=0, validated=0 · Grok 60s prior: off · Claude verifier: verified=9, approve=0, veto=9 · verdict=insufficient_evidence | n=7 | vetoed-would-win=0.00 | vetoed-would-pnl=$-350.00
dep_arb_intel.note: Tier-1 dep-arb intel: Grok constraint screen + 60s convergence prior (observe); Claude maker-checker on conjunction binds only. veto_quality grades at settle.

baseline_cohort_gate.note: baseline quant path: 180-240s TTC band (scaled on 15m), high edge + strong CEX; UP blocked until promoted; green_path=15m DOWN cohort only (TV observe-only)

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective — never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

bucket_evidence.rule: blocked iff confidently_losing AND fdr_significant (Wilson upper < breakeven, PF < min, BH-FDR q=0.10)

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.

arbitrage.note: arb halt only on anomaly (guaranteed_profit<=0); risk-free P&L is segregated

dependency_arbitrage.note: Lane B halt on booking anomaly only; walk-forward is observability

stop_conditions.note: quantitative kill switches checked each tick from settled ledger evidence; NOT the LLM's opinion. Halting blocks NEW entries only.

execution_realistic_edge.note: KL divergence is observe-only — large KL means model disagrees with market; never a buy signal when model Brier > market Brier.

RSI-trend states show ~2000 scored predictions with accuracy 0.4775 (random) despite larger per-state samples. No confirmed profitable patterns; everything remains inconclusive.
changes_since_last: no prior analysis supplied; first observation

history.summary: Only 4 settled signal trades exist (all DOWN_STRONG, n<8), producing 25% win-rate and negative realized PnL despite mildly positive avg_ev_after_cost; no bucket meets the n>=8 threshold for confirmation. RSI-trend state learning has larger history but remains purely diagnostic and shows near-random accuracy (~0.48). Everything else is noise or insufficient evidence.

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only — never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only — never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_edge.note: FADE = confidently anti-predictive (Wilson upper < breakeven) -> trade the inverse (gated, never auto); FOLLOW = Wilson lower > breakeven; else OBSERVE. Measured on real settled outcomes; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

trading_performance.note: Profitability, win-rate, side balance (DOWN>UP), and ledger integrity.

operation.note: Engine health: reconciliation, loops, stops, and pipeline activity.

external_signals.note: External signal quality and how well signals align with bot outcomes.

proposals.observation: Signal 'grok_predictor' (all) is anti-predictive: acc 0.469 over n=1801, Wilson upper 0.492 < 0.5.
proposals.hypothesis: Trading the INVERSE of this signal has positive expected accuracy.
proposals.proposed_change: Promote source=grok_predictor to FADE in the signal-edge layer (trade inverse), gated + capped.
proposals.evidence_gate: FADE only while Wilson upper stays < 0.5 on a rolling window; demote if it crosses.

proposals.observation: Signal 'grok_decider' (all) is anti-predictive: acc 0.333 over n=378, Wilson upper 0.382 < 0.5.
proposals.hypothesis: Trading the INVERSE of this signal has positive expected accuracy.
proposals.proposed_change: Promote source=grok_decider to FADE in the signal-edge layer (trade inverse), gated + capped.
proposals.evidence_gate: FADE only while Wilson upper stays < 0.5 on a rolling window; demote if it crosses.

proposals.observation: Dep-arb capture_ratio -0.183 on $2226 theoretical (127 settled) — edge bleeds at hold.
proposals.hypothesis: nested_implication holds to resolution; mid-gap may converge before settlement.
proposals.proposed_change: Keep nested_execute=0; soak mid_convergence observer; if 60s converged_rate>0.5, prototype mid-exit paper lane.
proposals.evidence_gate: Mid-convergence n>=10 at 60s with converged_rate>=0.5 before mid-exit execute.

proposals.observation: 5x not proven (improvement_ratio -11.307); primary edge source: arbitrage.
proposals.hypothesis: Total P&L is below the 5x baseline; the proven lane should get the capital.
proposals.proposed_change: Concentrate sizing/iteration on the primary edge source (arbitrage) and park unproven lanes.
proposals.evidence_gate: improvement_ratio must trend up across soaks with the proven lane leading.

loop_synthesis.summary: 4 proposal(s); 3 high-priority. Top: [signals] Promote source=grok_predictor to FADE in the signal-edge layer (trade inverse), gated + capped.
loop_synthesis.note: Advisory next-experiment proposals from live performance. Paper-only; never edits config or trades. Each names the evidence gate that would justify acting.
